title: Chaos
description: Mostly random, but could become chaotic or fun with friends!
body:
![mod logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b45446dbf97eb60c1842ce6cc7ecb25244457007.png)
This mod adds armor, tools, and mostly random items. It can be chaotic, unpredictable, and sometimes completely nonsensical—but that’s part of the fun! With unique recipes, quirky advancements, and weird surprises, it’s a great side mod to mess around with, especially with friends.

Some textures in this mod are based on original Minecraft assets from various versions of the game.

**Well.. My motivation's higher now**

[Development Version](https://modrinth.com/mod/chaos-development)

### This project is sadly discontinued indefinitely due to me losing all of the files.
